Package com.cake.struts.content.block

net.neoforged.neoforge.attachment.AttachmentHolder

  • Field Details

    • CLIENT_UPDATE_LISTENER

      @Nullable public static @Nullable BiConsumer<net.minecraft.world.level.Level,StrutBlockEntity> CLIENT_UPDATE_LISTENER
      Set on the client during startup to receive connection-change notifications. Never referenced from dedicated-server code.
